name: atomic-commit-mcp
description: MCP server for atomic git commits with hunk-level staging, dry-run validation, undo, and changelog generation

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=build/index.js --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' && chmod 755 build/index.js && cp build/index.js ../plugins/atomic/server.js
